title: catevala minima
intro: Catevala minima, also known as the dwarf catevala, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family. The medicinal properties of Catevala minima include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of consuming Catevala minima include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Catevala minima can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a supplement in capsule or tablet form.
